case_for: Evans has a track record of explosive weeks (23.1, 28.7, 23.4) and a strong pregame projection of 23.4 pts, suggesting he's a high-volume, high-upside target in his offense's passing attack.
case_against: His recent volatility, including a 3.7-point dud and a 7.2-point game just two and three weeks ago, shows he can be neutralized by matchups or game script, creating real bust risk.
